title: Eternal Chalice
description: A mod that adds a non-overpowered infinite bucket.
body:
|![ETERNAL CHALICE](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/n7UO62qM/images/6db918c09159b7e94c460b61dfaf4d6d0e82a373.png)|
|:-:|
|[![PATREON](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/5734cca1afdce0361bf51525d192d857e4ee5255.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Crumbslord)     [![TWITTER](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/3258940f91415129514d21e643c3ecbed11f54aa.png)](https://twitter.com/CrumbsLord)    [![CURSEFORGE](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/534277007517bb3af8a2cdd14b49d1fe3d67e2ee.png)](https://curseforge.com/members/lord_of_crumbs)     [![MODRINTH](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/upFzdohS/images/d6ef08c353be7e06bf25284aadf17f296f81e85e.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Lord_Of_Crumbs)|

![INFO](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/n7UO62qM/images/81060a6c8a4fc73c9fbd83af51634487cae07f7d.png)


This mod's goal is to add a non-overpowered infinite bucket.

 

It accomplishes this task of being a late game item with requiring a nether star to craft.


![FEATURES](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/n7UO62qM/images/1ca5123a18158adbfdda663448757cd470021a88.png)


Features:

- Empty infinite chalice
- Infinite Water chalice
- Empty infinite netherite chalice
- Infinite Lava chalice
- Infinite Powdered Snow chalice
- Infinite milk chalice
- Infinite cake chalice
- Pufferfish chalice
 

Planned Features: (wip; might change)

- Infinite potion chalice (maybe too op but idk)
